title: Before You Apply
intro: We carefully review every application submitted to St. Hannah Foundation. To help us assess your request accurately and efficiently, please ensure that all information provided is complete, truthful and supported by relevant documentation where applicable.
importantNotes: Applications are reviewed individually based on need, eligibility and available resources.
Submission of an application does not automatically guarantee approval.
Additional information or supporting documents may be requested during the review process.
Our team may contact you for clarification or verification.
All information provided will be treated with confidentiality and respect.
requiredInformation: Detailed description of the support being requested
Medical reports for medical aid applications
Educational records for education support applications
